mapper.select: SELECT id, login_id, password, user_name, nick_name, birth, email, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM users WHERE login_id = #{loginId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT id, login_id, password, user_name, nick_name, birth, email, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT id, login_id, password, user_name, nick_name, birth, email, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM users WHERE nick_name = #{nickName} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users( login_id, password, user_name, nick_name, birth, email ) VALUES ( #{loginId}, #{password}, #{userName}, #{nickName}, #{birth}, #{email} )
